name: ui-ux-pro-max
description: UI/UX and product-site design intelligence. 67 styles, 161 palettes, 57 font pairings, product-site architecture, page-family patterns, section patterns, 25 charts, and 16 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, Astro, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Nuxt, Nuxt UI, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Jetpack Compose, Three.js, Angular, Laravel). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: product websites, landing pages, feature pages, pricing pages, dashboards, admin panels, e-commerce, SaaS, marketplaces, portfolios, blogs, mobile apps. Elements: sitemap, navigation, hero, feature grid, pricing table, trust proof, button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Topics: Claude Design prompts, color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient.
